title: Russia-Ukraine clashes: Explosions rock Kyiv in rare daytime attack as drone war intensifies
summary_full: Kyiv faced a rare daytime Russian assault Monday as air defenses intercepted projectiles, with debris falling in the city center. This escalation follows Moscow's claim of repelling a major Ukrainian drone attack over the weekend. Meanwhile, US peace efforts are reportedly stalled amid the widening Middle East conflict, highlighting the growing role of drones in modern warfare.
